description: Case style: Stainless steel round case with a fixed bezel Dial style: Black dial with black and metallic hands Strap style: Olive plastic strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style Features: Three chronograph time displays, date aperture on the dial, branding on the 12 hour mark dial and screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 metres, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years international warranty
